description: Boundary diagnostics — calling a non-callable reactive value isn't lifted; the raw 'has no call signatures' TS error is rewritten into a teaching message. Both an arithmetic-derived (sum) and a call-derived (called) binding qualify. The unrelated number→string error is left untouched (not rewritten).

diagnostics.message: This expression is not callable.   Type 'RenderObservable<number>' has no call signatures.
This expression is not callable.   Type 'RenderObservable<number>' has no call signatures.
Type 'number' is not assignable to type 'string'.
